about.title: About Me
about.description: Young developer specializing in JavaScript, React, and frontend development based in Mallorca, Spain. I build blazing-fast web apps with Vite, craft stunning, SEO-optimized interfaces, and excel in HTML/CSS markup. Skilled in ChatGPT web integrations and Node.js backend development. Need a creative, efficient frontend developer? Let’s talk!
